query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_manga FROM manga; SELECT COUNT(*) as total_chapters FROM chapters; SELECT m.title, COUNT(c.id) as chapter_count FROM manga m LEFT JOIN chapters c ON m.id = c.mangaId GROUP BY m.id, m.title ORDER BY chapter_count DESC LIMIT 10;
